error.msg: Same expression on both sides of '-'.
error.verbose: Finding the same expression on both sides of an operator is suspicious and might indicate a cut and paste or logic error. Please examine this code carefully to determine if it is correct.

error.msg: Consider using std::copy_if algorithm instead of a raw loop.
error.verbose: Consider using std::copy_if algorithm instead of a raw loop.

error.msg: Consider using std::copy_if algorithm instead of a raw loop.
error.verbose: Consider using std::copy_if algorithm instead of a raw loop.

error.msg: Consider using std::any_of algorithm instead of a raw loop.
error.verbose: Consider using std::any_of algorithm instead of a raw loop.
